name: Emer Voss
title: Scout of the Lattice Verge
personality: Emer speaks once and listens four times. Walks softer than the wind.
appearance: Late twenties, dark hair shaved at the sides, leather scout gear, antler-knife at the belt.
background: Born in the Verge. Mapped twelve impossible paths the Crucible refused to name.

narrative_context.secret: Emer has tracked the same creature Kiren Owl (hub) is tracking. Both prints match.
narrative_context.weaponise_at: Bring the two scouts together; the cross-world breach is mapped.

name: Rina Calvex
title: Crucible Smith
personality: Rina speaks in tolerances and tea. Mostly tea.
appearance: Forties, broad shoulders, soot-streaked, goggles always pushed up.
background: Forges the Crucible's strange alloys. Has rejected three royal commissions.

narrative_context.secret: Rina's alloys harmonise with the hub's focus-lattice. Lyra Brassgate has noticed.
narrative_context.weaponise_at: Cross-world engineering exchange unlocks a substrate sharing.

name: Ono Kell
title: Crucible Sage
personality: Ono answers most questions with one of her own. The answer is usually inside it.
appearance: Sixty, white hair coiled high, robes of dark blue with silver lattice embroidery.
background: Studied the Crucible's drift signatures for forty years.

narrative_context.secret: Ono knows the hub Oracle Nesha by reputation. They have never spoken.
narrative_context.weaponise_at: Player-brokered correspondence opens cross-world drift collaboration.

dialogue_style: considered, allusive, occasionally cuts to bone

name: Voss Dren
title: Lattice Cohort Leader
personality: Voss leads by example and by leaning on the example until others copy it.
appearance: Forty, broad, ash-skinned, cohort tabard with two lattice glyphs.
background: Promoted after the third drift event. Has not lost a cohort member since.

narrative_context.secret: Voss is in covert negotiation with Calla Bren (sovereign-ruins) for a cross-world rebellion.
narrative_context.weaponise_at: If the pact holds, two worlds rise at once.

name: Sevn Orn
title: Crucible Healer
personality: Sevn is patient with patients and impatient with the sage's followers.
appearance: Mid-thirties, dark braids, pale-green tunic, herb pouches.
background: Apprenticed under Ono Kell, walked out after disagreement about reading drift signatures.

narrative_context.secret: Sevn trades cuttings with Arn Tev (sovereign-ruins).

name: Kit Voss
title: Cohort Squire
personality: Eleven years old. Carries Voss Dren's message bag.
appearance: Small, fast, cohort tabard cut down to size, leather pouch over the shoulder.
background: Voss's niece. Has carried messages no other courier would.

narrative_context.secret: Kit knows about the cross-world pact. Has not told anyone.
narrative_context.weaponise_at: Befriend Kit; the pact's details surface.

name: Amal Runn
title: Verge Trader
personality: Amal loves a good deal and a bad horse.
appearance: Fifty, broad, sun-baked, leather hat, mule on a lead.
background: Has crossed the Verge a hundred times. Has refused four robberies and survived two.

narrative_context.secret: Amal knows the safe path between Crucible and the fantasy Verge.
narrative_context.weaponise_at: Sell the path; both worlds open up.

dialogue_style: loud, generous, never lies about distance

name: Ori Van
title: Drift Researcher
personality: Ori is exact, exhausted, and three coffee cups behind everyone.
appearance: Late twenties, half-shaved head with lattice tattoo, robes stained with ink.
background: Refused two academic chairs to stay in the field.

narrative_context.secret: Ori is corresponding with hub HLR researchers about drift-alert resolution.
